import { useState } from "react"; const AddFixture = ({currentFixtures, setFixtureIntoArray} : any) => { const [fixture, setFixture] = useState({homeTeam: "", awayTeam: "", homeScore: "0", awayScore: "0", result: ""}); const submit = (e : any) => { e.preventDefault(); setFixtureIntoArray([...currentFixtures, { id: currentFixtures.length + 1, date: Date(), result: fixture.result, homeTeam: fixture.homeTeam, awayTeam: fixture.awayTeam, homeScore: fixture.homeScore, awayScore: fixture.awayScore, fixture: "League" } ]); } return ( <>
); } export default AddFixture;
